title: Spanish woman who died through euthanasia failed by state, say critics
summary_full: Noelia Castillo died on Thursday evening in a Barcelona hospital, after a protracted legal battle with her own father.
summary_public: Noelia Castillo died on Thursday evening in a Barcelona hospital, after a protracted legal battle with her own father.
